title: Rename device - old FW no rename, new FW rename present
scenario: Device Name setting hidden in Device Settings > General on old firmware, appears after firmware update on supported Poly devices
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC, Poly Voyager Free 60, Poly Voyager Free 20, Poly Sync 20, Poly Sync 20M, or Poly Sync 40) is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
5. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting is NOT displayed in the General menu.
6. Update the connected device's firmware to the latest version via the app (if not already on the latest).
7. After the firmware update completes and the device reconnects, navigate back to Device Settings > General.
8. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting now appears in the General menu.
expected: On old firmware, the 'Device Name' setting is not shown in Device Settings > General. After updating to new firmware, the 'Device Name' setting appears in Device Settings > General.
